# JDK-8320139: [JVMCI] VmObjectAlloc is not generated by intrinsics methods which allocate objects

## 基本信息

| 属性 | 值 |
|------|-----|
| **Issue** | [JDK-8320139](https://bugs.openjdk.org/browse/JDK-8320139) |
| **PR** | [#16980](https://github.com/openjdk/jdk/pull/16980) |
| **Author** | rmosaner |
| **Created** | 2023-12-05 |
| **Merged** | 2023-12-21 |
| **审查天数** | 16 |
| **版本** | JDK 22 |
| **优先级** | P4 |
| **组件** | hotspot |
| **模块** | compiler/jvmci |
| **代码变更** | +13 / -0 (3 files) |
| **审查者** | dougxc, tkrodriguez (2 人) |

## 描述

This PR exports a pointer to `JvmtiExport::_should_notify_object_alloc` via JVMCI to enable intrinsification of unsafe allocations in accordance to C2.
